scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run build --workspace @cv-control/shared && npm run build --workspace @cv-control/api && npm run build:electron --workspace @cv-control/web && npm run build && node scripts/swap-abi.mjs electron && electron .; status=$?; node scripts/swap-abi.mjs node; exit $status'
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/swap-abi.mjs electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml && node scripts/swap-abi.mjs node
